name: MultiWaitable

values.name: init2
values.type: (a -> b -> msg) -> MultiWaitable.Wait2 msg a b

values.name: init3
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> msg) -> MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c

values.name: init4
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> msg) -> MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d

values.name: toResults2
values.type: MultiWaitable.Wait2 (a -> b -> msg) a b -> MultiWaitable.Results2 a b

values.name: toResults3
values.type: MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c -> MultiWaitable.Results3 a b c

values.name: toResults4
values.type: MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d -> MultiWaitable.Results4 a b c d

values.name: wait2Update1
values.type: a -> MultiWaitable.Wait2 msg a b -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait2 msg a b, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait2Update2
values.type: b -> MultiWaitable.Wait2 msg a b -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait2 msg a b, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait3Update1
values.type: a -> MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait3Update2
values.type: b -> MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait3Update3
values.type: c -> MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait3 msg a b c, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait4Update1
values.type: a -> MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait4Update2
values.type: b -> MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait4Update3
values.type: c -> MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: wait4Update4
values.type: d -> MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d -> ( MultiWaitable.Wait4 msg a b c d, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )
